name: law firm billing administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For law firm billing administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation instead of manual invoicing processes using spreadsheets.
target_audience: law firm billing administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Manual conversion of time entries to invoices is time-consuming and error-prone.
features: manual review option before sending invoices
